name: express-api-starter
description: A basic starter for an express.js API
author: CJ R. <cj@null.computer> (https://w3cj.now.sh)

scripts.testMod:s: mkdir -p logs && DEBUG=exp:* node --env-file=.env scripts/model.test.js > logs/testModel.log 2>&1
scripts.testRep:s: mkdir -p logs && DEBUG=exp:* node --env-file=.env scripts/repository.test.js > logs/testRepository.log 2>&1
scripts.testSrv:s: mkdir -p logs && DEBUG=exp:* node --env-file=.env scripts/service.test.js > logs/testService.log 2>&1
scripts.testCtrl:s: mkdir -p logs && DEBUG=exp:* node --env-file=.env scripts/controller.test.js > logs/testController.log 2>&1
